results.name: earth
results.description: Art depicting our world of Earth that we're living in now.

results.name: earthbend
results.description: Collection tag used to apply the various tags that comprise the keyword Earthbend. Should be 1:1 with kw:earthbend.

results.name: earthbending
results.description: Legend has it that the people of the Earth Kingdom originally learned this bending tradition from the badgermoles. Some advanced earthbenders can also manipulate metal or even melt rock into molten lava. For generic earth magic, see [geomancy](geomancy).

results.name: earthquake
results.description: Spells that deal damage to creatures without flying.

results.name: earth rumble arena
results.description: The underground stadium in Gaoling that hosted the Earth Rumble tournament in the episode "The Blind Bandit."

results.name: easter egg
results.description: The artist(s) has hidden some subtle, amusing details in these images.

results.name: eastern air temple
results.description: The one where Aang trained with Guru Pathik.

results.name: eastern dragon
results.description: The serpent-like eastern dragons of Asian mythology.

results.name: eat food
results.description: Cards that involve actual food, generally being eaten.

results.name: echoverse
results.description: The alternate universe that Jace Beleren created

results.name: edda blackbosom
results.description: Adventurer turned necromancer in Final Fantasy XIV

results.name: eddie brock
results.description: The original host of the [Venom](venom-symbiote) symbiote.

results.name: egali
results.description: A plain in the Savai triome, on Ikoria.

results.name: egg
results.description: Artifacts that have to be sacrificed to do something.

results.name: eldrazi
results.description: Creatures native to the Blind Eternities—the space between the planes—which consume mana and entire planes. Best known for posing existential threat to Zendikar and its denizens, and later to Innistrad.
